overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game, walking along a rainy neon-lit waterfront promenade at night. The player moves through open concrete walkways, ascends stairs to narrow elevated wooden corridors, and emerges to panoramic views of a futuristic city skyline with massive holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with street vendors

events.description: passing by a green food vendor cart with steam rising

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet concrete promenade, observing neon storefronts and street vendors

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind green food cart arranging items
pedestrian in green jacket walking away from camera along the waterfront

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with graffiti running along the left side of the promenade
bright red neon arrow sign pointing left, mounted on the building facade
green mobile food vendor cart with steam rising from the top
low concrete wall separating the walkway from the water
tall skyscrapers covered in glowing holographic advertisements and neon signage

segments.scene_description: Walking along an open concrete waterfront promenade at night in the rain. The left side features a tall concrete retaining wall with a bright red neon arrow sign, while street vendors operate green food carts. To the right, a low concrete barrier separates the walkway from the water, with towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area with outdoor seating and stairway entrance

events.description: approaching concrete stairway leading upward to elevated walkway
beginning to ascend the concrete stairs with metal handrails

agents.ego_description: walking past outdoor seating areas and beginning to climb the concrete stairs to the upper level

entered.detail: set of concrete stairs with metal handrails leading upward
stacked red plastic chairs and tables for outdoor seating
tall street lamp casting warm orange light through the rain

segments.scene_description: Moving through a transition area with red plastic outdoor seating stacked on the right. The concrete retaining wall continues on the left as the camera approaches and begins ascending a concrete stairway. Overhead street lamps cast warm orange light through the rain, and the waterfront view disappears behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow elevated wooden walkway with corrugated metal walls

events.description: transitioning from concrete stairs to narrow wooden elevated walkway with red railings
passing close by a woman in red top who temporarily blocks part of the left side view

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow wooden walkway, passing by a woman standing against the corrugated metal wall

notable_agents.action: woman in red top and black shorts standing against the wall holding a bottle

entered.detail: wet wooden planks forming the elevated walkway surface
industrial corrugated metal wall with rust and graffiti
red painted metal safety railing along the right edge of the walkway
wooden awning overhead providing shelter from the rain
large industrial air conditioning unit mounted on the metal wall

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow elevated wooden walkway enclosed by corrugated metal walls on the left and red safety railings on the right. The overhead wooden awning provides shelter from the rain. A woman in a red top stands against the wall holding a bottle as the camera passes by. Industrial air conditioning units are mounted on the metal walls, and neon lights reflect off the wet wooden planks.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance with arcade machines opening to city overlook

events.description: approaching building entrance with glowing arcade machines visible through glass doors
emerging from narrow corridor to open view of city skyline with massive holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking past the building entrance with arcade machines, continuing along the walkway as the view opens to the illuminated city skyline

entered.detail: glass door entrance to a building with warm interior lighting
row of glowing arcade game machines visible inside the building entrance
giant holographic advertising screens covering the facades of distant skyscrapers
towering futuristic buildings with intricate lighting and architectural details

segments.scene_description: Approaching a building entrance with glass doors revealing glowing arcade machines inside. The wooden walkway continues past the entrance, and the view opens dramatically to reveal a panoramic city skyline. Massive holographic billboards and futuristic skyscrapers dominate the horizon, their lights reflecting through the rain and steam rising from vents below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rainy, open-air waterfront promenade into the heart of a dense, neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape. It begins by moving along a concrete walkway flanked by green food carts and a red neon arrow, with towering holographic skyscrapers shimmering in the distance across the water. As the camera passes stacked red plastic seating, it ascends a concrete stairway under warm orange street lamps, causing the waterfront view to disappear behind the rising terrain. The scene then shifts into a narrow, sheltered wooden corridor enclosed by corrugated metal walls and red railings, passing a woman in a red top and industrial AC units while neon lights reflect off the wet planks. Finally, the camera moves past a glass entrance revealing glowing arcade machines before the view opens dramatically to a panoramic skyline of massive holographic billboards and futuristic towers amidst rising steam and rain.
